crons.name: weekly-pipeline-health
crons.prompt: Run weekly content pipeline health check: fetch GET https://clearpath-production-c86d.up.railway.app/api/marketing/content-digest with X-API-Key from $CLEARPATH_API_KEY. Check kill switch first. Report to Josh (chat_id 6690120787): seeds in bin, pipeline by stage (idea/outlined/draft/approved), newsletter status for this week. If no newsletter draft exists for this week, trigger generation via POST /api/grow/newsletter/generate. Flag any health issues clearly. Log token usage after.

crons.name: nudge-check
crons.prompt: Run content pipeline nudge check: fetch GET https://clearpath-production-c86d.up.railway.app/api/marketing/content-digest with X-API-Key from $CLEARPATH_API_KEY. Check kill switch first. Examine the flags array. If it contains any of: seed_bin_empty, pipeline_empty, nothing_approved_to_post, newsletter_not_approved — send a brief nudge to Josh (chat_id 6690120787) describing exactly what needs attention and what action to take. If flags array is empty, do nothing (NUDGE_OK). Log token usage after.
